ledger_gate->moth_orchard.text: The orchard accepts the ledger's stamped shadow, but charges one breath of engine heat.

red_archive->last_lighthouse.text: The red archive recites every route the crew forgot to mourn.

steady.text: Run the preflight litany until every bell answers in order.

bold.text: Launch before the berth finishes counting your name.

merciful.text: Leave a lamp for the dockhands who will not see you return.

witness_pool->ashen_comet.text: The pool's reflection clings to the comet ash and reveals a second-safe angle.

red_archive->silkforge.text: The forge recognizes the archive's red index and discounts the next repair with old debt.

steady.text: The lighthouse wick drinks the white beam and steadies the answer.

merciful.text: The silkglass compass points toward the route that still remembers mercy.

bold.text: The archive-red key cools in your palm and unlocks the contradiction safely.

ending_epilogues.radiant: The Last Lighthouse writes the crew into the chart as a living constellation.
ending_epilogues.fractured: The ship returns with a usable map and a few locked rooms no one can yet name.
ending_epilogues.lost: The final beam burns the route into warning glass for the next Bridge Helm.
